sealed_ledger.title: The Sealed Ledger
sealed_ledger.objective: Recover the ledger that proves Gallowsford relief supplies were stolen.

greyhook_fortress.title: The Prisoner Under Greyhook
greyhook_fortress.objective: Enter Greyhook Fortress, reach the sealed prisoner, decide their fate, and escape the consequences.

supply.label: Supply escort
supply.text: Enter as paid supply protection. Clean, armed, watched, and legible to Free Spears or martial parties.

blackmail.label: Quartermaster blackmail
blackmail.text: Force the quartermaster to open a service path. Useful and poisonous; the same leverage can be turned against you.

infirmary.label: Infirmary route
infirmary.text: Enter under medical and ritual authority. Quiet, restricted, and morally watched.

forgery.label: Forged transfer
forgery.text: Use a forged prisoner transfer order. Fastest route to the lower cells, highest inspection risk.

captured.label: Captured-inside route
captured.text: Stage an arrest, accept a failed transfer, or turn a hard failure into position near the lower cells. Ugly, costly, never a game over.

escape.label: Escape route
escape.text: A drainage mark and timing window used to survive lockdown or extraction aftermath.

gate_search.label: Gate Search Pattern
gate_search.clue: Gate search pattern learned: papers first, weapons second, intent last.

forged_papers_inspection.label: Forged Papers Inspection
forged_papers_inspection.clue: The forged papers survive close inspection, but the ink is remembered.

staged_arrest.label: Stage Arrest
staged_arrest.clue: The staged arrest works: painful, public, and close to the lower cells.

enemy_recognition.label: Enemy Recognition
enemy_recognition.clue: A personal enemy has a way to make Greyhook look twice.

yard_patrols.label: Study Patrols
yard_patrols.clue: Patrols thin near the infirmary bell and thicken after the second watch horn.

companion_greyhook_angle.label: Companion Greyhook Angle
companion_greyhook_angle.clue: A companion finds a route-shaped weakness in Greyhook's routine.

starting_enemy_interference.label: Starting Enemy Interference
starting_enemy_interference.clue: Your starting enemy turns Greyhook's order against you.

patrol_confrontation.label: Patrol Confrontation
patrol_confrontation.clue: A patrol confrontation leaves your faces better remembered.

search_escape_mark.label: Search for Escape Mark
search_escape_mark.clue: Escape mark found near the drainage stair.

quartermaster_lockbox.label: Search Lockbox
quartermaster_lockbox.clue: Lower-cell ring key acquired from the quartermaster lockbox.

trace_missing_supplies.label: Trace Missing Supplies
trace_missing_supplies.clue: Missing supplies trace back to the quartermaster's private ledger.

threaten_bribe_bargain.label: Threaten / Bribe / Bargain
threaten_bribe_bargain.clue: The quartermaster opens the service path and starts planning revenge.

respect_infirmary_restriction.label: Respect Infirmary Restriction
respect_infirmary_restriction.clue: Visible restraint makes the infirmary route safer than armed escort work.

infirmary_records.label: Search Patient Records
infirmary_records.clue: No rites. No visitors. No name. Crown witness.

treat_wounded_soldier.label: Treat Wounded Soldier
treat_wounded_soldier.clue: A wounded soldier remembers mercy better than orders.

captured_inside.label: Captured Inside
captured_inside.clue: Capture becomes a route: bruised, searched, and near the sealed row.

talk_past_cell_guard.label: Talk Past Cell Guard
talk_past_cell_guard.clue: The cell guard can be delayed, not fooled forever.

smuggle_message.label: Smuggle Message
smuggle_message.clue: A message reaches the sealed prisoner before you do.

first_contact.label: First Contact
first_contact.clue: The prisoner whispers: The Crown of Ash was a right to name the dead.

archive_hook.label: Read Dead-Name Index
archive_hook.clue: The Dead-Name Index points beyond Greyhook.

archive_seal.label: Find Archive Seal
archive_seal.clue: An archive seal names the Crown of Ash without explaining it.

bell_underwater.label: Hear the Bell Underwater
bell_underwater.clue: Somewhere under Greyhook, a bell rings as if under water.

question.label: Question
question.nextHook: The prisoner names the Dead-Name Index.

extract.label: Extract
extract.nextHook: The living witness must be hidden before the Synod Archive can be reached.

silence.label: Silence
silence.nextHook: The dead still have names, and someone heard the silence.

trade.label: Trade
trade.nextHook: The buyer mentions the Dead-Name Index.

question.mara: Mara respects a truth taken without wasting the exit.
question.hadrik: Hadrik calls it the first honorable thing Greyhook has seen today.
question.nell: Nell is relieved the locked-door person was treated like a person.
question.sarn: Sarn asks whether the statement can be copied twice.
question.ilyra: Ilyra approves. Mercy and evidence rarely walk together.
question.cael: Cael names the choice mercy with usable edges.
question.brig: Brig thinks an answer is less useful than leverage.
question.miren: Miren listens to what the prisoner refuses to say.

extract.mara: Mara starts counting routes out before anyone asks.
extract.hadrik: Hadrik treats extraction like a soldier's burden.
extract.nell: Nell checks every hinge and every conscience.
extract.sarn: Sarn wants a receipt for the living witness.
extract.ilyra: Ilyra accepts the risk because the prisoner still breathes.
extract.cael: Cael is already planning who must hide the witness next.
extract.brig: Brig smiles at the coming chase.
extract.miren: Miren says living witnesses cast longer shadows.

silence.mara: Mara says nothing, which is worse than anger.
silence.hadrik: Hadrik marks the act and does not forgive it yet.
silence.nell: Nell hates killing someone already locked away.
silence.sarn: Sarn notes that silence is portable leverage.
silence.ilyra: Ilyra is shaken by the murder of a patient in all but name.
silence.cael: Cael writes the death down because someone should.
silence.brig: Brig approves of fewer mouths and fewer witnesses.
silence.miren: Miren listens for the dead name left behind.

trade.mara: Mara dislikes selling a tactical problem to a worse tactician.
trade.nell: Nell refuses to look at the receipt.
trade.sarn: Sarn checks whether the betrayal receipt is genuine.
trade.ilyra: Ilyra treats the trade like a wound that will rot.
trade.cael: Cael says some bargains cannot be washed clean.
trade.brig: Brig respects the profit and not much else.
trade.miren: Miren wonders who bought the name underneath the prisoner.

wanted.name: Sergeant Varric Kelm
wanted.effect: recognizes a forged pattern, raises alert, and can frame the party during lockdown.

debtor.name: Marta Red-Sum
debtor.effect: offers debt relief for betrayal and tries to buy the same quartermaster leverage.

shamed.name: Prior Halvek
shamed.effect: blocks infirmary grace and demands confession or prisoner handover.

cursed.name: The Ash-Sleeved Stranger
cursed.effect: wants the prisoner alive and raises the Cinder Veil ritual clock.

acceptance: New game can reach Greyhook naturally.
Greyhook has at least four viable entry routes.
Failed entry can open captured-inside route.
The prisoner can be questioned, extracted, silenced, or traded.
Companion reactions, morale, faction reputation, and legal record are visible.
A Greyhook outcome and next chapter hook appear on the Case Board.
Game data passes npm run validate.
